title: geum rossii var. turbinatum
intro: Geum rossii var. turbinatum, commonly known as the Alpine Avens, is a flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Geum rossii var. turbinatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
